title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0090 2 Merton Road, Bristol, BS7 8TL
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  MSJ Developments (Bristol) Ltd  Site address:  2 Merton Road, Bristol, BS7 8TL  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a second floor extension, and the change of use to 6no. small houses in multiple occupation (Use Class C4).  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 12 June 2025   Date by when representations must be made 18 July 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 7 August 2025   Decision date 7 August 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 149 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 18 July 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0090 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     250225 cover letter PR002374 FINAL  (PDF, 1.35 MB, 11 pages)  application form  (PDF, 2.12 MB, 14 pages)  1850-P-101 PROPOSED PLANS REV F  (PDF, 345 KB, 1 page)  1850-P-102 PROPOSED PLANS REV D  (PDF, 420 KB, 1 page)  20-Space-Amazon-Eco-Two-Tier-Information-Sheet  (PDF, 409 KB, 1 page)  2402386PREAPP (003)  (PDF, 309 KB, 28 pages)  1850-P-103 PROPOSED PLANS REV B  (PDF, 241 KB, 1 page)  1850-P-104 PROPOSED ELEVATIONS REV B  (PDF, 198 KB, 1 page)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 332 KB, 3 pages)  cil_questions  (PDF, 794 KB, 6 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 578 KB, 1 page)  23 02268 F-PRELIMINARY RISK ASSESSMENT 1 OF 7  (PDF, 7.31 MB, 40 pages)  23 02268 F-PRELIMINARY RISK ASSESSMENT 2 OF 7  (PDF, 25.4 MB, 35 pages)...
